source_documents.filename: Bijlage 2 - Brede Businesscase Nieuw Legmeer 2024 bij collegevoorstel Businesscase Nieuw Legmeer 2024.pdf

note: Slim envelope-driver subset of framework.json. Numerical constraints filtered to categories: ['bvo_limit', 'footprint', 'fsi_far', 'height', 'setback', 'use_mix']. Full audit trail (narrative, noise, parking, sustainability) remains in framework.json.

numerical_constraints.name: Maximaal bebouwd percentage per cluster
numerical_constraints.condition: Per ontwikkelcluster

provenance.quoted_text: Op maximaal 70% van het cluster is het mogelijk om een gebouwd programma te realiseren.

reasons: Clearly stated in the text and repeated in the Spelregels bullet: 'Elk cluster is voor maximaal 70% bebouwd.'
Document type is 'other' (beeldkwaliteitsplan), which is informative/guiding rather than a binding bestemmingsplan regels document, so max confidence capped at 0.9.

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: Max 70% of each cluster may be built upon; remaining minimum 30% must remain unbuilt (bovengronds onbebouwd).

numerical_constraints.name: Minimaal onbebouwd percentage per cluster
numerical_constraints.condition: Per ontwikkelcluster; bovengronds onbebouwd

provenance.quoted_text: De overige gronden (minimaal 30%) blijven bovengronds onbebouwd.

reasons: Directly stated in text and confirmed by diagram caption 'Minimaal 30% van cluster is onbebouwd'.
Beeldkwaliteitsplan is guiding, not a binding regels document; score capped accordingly.

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: At least 30% of each cluster must remain unbuilt above ground and publicly accessible.

numerical_constraints.name: Maximale bouwhoogte Het Carré, Het Eiland, De Mantel
numerical_constraints.condition: Met uitzondering van hoogbouwaccenten. Geldt voor 'Het Carré', 'Het Eiland' en 'De Mantel'.

provenance.quoted_text: Maximale bouwhoogte in 'Het Carré', 'Het Eiland' en 'De Mantel': 6 bouwlagen, met uitzondering van hoogbouwaccenten.

reasons: Clearly stated in the Spelregels bullet list. Document type is 'other' (beeldkwaliteitplan), which is advisory rather than binding regels, so capped below 1.0.

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: The 'Amstelveense hoogte' standard. Hoogbouwaccenten (12-14 bouwlagen) are explicitly excepted.

numerical_constraints.name: Maximale bouwhoogte Het Hart
numerical_constraints.condition: Geldt voor deelgebied 'Het Hart'. Lagere hoogte om het intieme karakter te borgen.

provenance.quoted_text: Maximale bouwhoogte in 'Het Hart': 4 bouwlagen.

reasons: Clearly stated in the Spelregels bullet list and confirmed by diagram annotation. Advisory document, so not 1.0.

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: Diagram label confirms 'Hart: max 4 bouwlagen'.

numerical_constraints.name: Bouwhoogte hoogbouwaccenten
numerical_constraints.condition: Geldt voor hoogbouwaccenten, met name in de randen van de wijk.

provenance.quoted_text: 12 - 14 bouwlagen

reasons: Value appears in diagram annotation only, not in the Spelregels bullet list. Range suggests indicative rather than prescriptive.
Document is advisory beeldkwaliteitplan.

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: Range stated in diagram label '12 - 14 bouwlagen'. Not a hard cap in the Spelregels text, shown as accent height in the diagram.

numerical_constraints.name: Plinthoogte
numerical_constraints.condition: De plint telt als één bouwlaag.

provenance.quoted_text: Plint: 4-6 m

reasons: Range stated in diagram annotation. Supported by Spelregels statement 'De plint telt als één bouwlaag'. Advisory document.

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: Diagram shows 'Plint: 4-6 m'. Spelregels note that the plint counts as one bouwlaag.

numerical_constraints.name: Minimale onderlinge afstand hoogbouwaccenten (hart-hart)
numerical_constraints.condition: Gemeten van kern tot kern, met name in de randen van de wijk.

provenance.quoted_text: Hoogbouwaccenten staan minimaal 60 meter uit elkaar, gemeten van kern tot kern en met name in de randen van de wijk.

reasons: Clearly stated in Spelregels. Confirmed by diagram caption. Advisory document, so not 1.0.

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: Stated both in Spelregels bullet and in diagram caption.

numerical_constraints.name: Maximale horizontale diameter gebouwen vanaf 7e bouwlaag
numerical_constraints.condition: Gerekend vanaf de 7e bouwlaag.

provenance.quoted_text: Gebouwen hebben een horizontale diameter maximaal 45 meter, gerekend vanaf de 7e bouwlaag.

reasons: Clearly stated in Spelregels. Advisory document so not 1.0.

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: Applies to the upper portion of buildings from the 7th floor upward.

numerical_constraints.condition: Zone aangeduid als maximaal 4 bouwlagen op de maximale bouwhoogte kaart

reasons: Clearly stated in the map legend under 'Maximale bouwhoogte'.
Document type is 'other' (beeldkwaliteitplan), which is informative/guiding rather than legally binding regels.
Unit 'bouwlagen' is stated explicitly in the legend text.

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: Shown on a map legend for 'Maximale bouwhoogte' in the Beeldkwaliteitplan. Two height zones are distinguished: max 4 and max 6 bouwlagen.

numerical_constraints.name: 60 meter contour hoogbouwaccent
numerical_constraints.condition: Ter plaatse van aangeduide zoeklocaties hoogbouwaccenten

provenance.quoted_text: 60 meter contour

reasons: The term '60 meter contour' appears in the legend of the 'Zoeklocaties hoogbouwaccenten' map.
It is unclear whether 60m refers to a height limit or a spatial radius/buffer around existing towers.
Document is a beeldkwaliteitplan (guiding, not binding).
No explicit binding rule text accompanies the legend.

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: The right-hand map shows 'Zoeklocaties hoogbouwaccenten' with a 60 meter contour and existing tower reference. This suggests high-rise accent locations are identified within a 60m radius zone of existing towers.

numerical_constraints.name: Minimale afstand van hotel
numerical_constraints.condition: Applies to hotel location

provenance.quoted_text: Minimale afstand van hotel 15 m

reasons: Value is clearly stated as 15 m in the legend
Context of what the setback applies to (from what boundary or element) is not specified
This is a beeldkwaliteitplan (urban design quality plan), not a binding regels document

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: Mentioned in the legend of the Spelregelkaart as 'Minimale afstand van hotel 15 m'. Context of application (setback from what boundary or element) is not specified on this page.

numerical_constraints.name: Minimale hoogte van een poort aan openbare ruimte zijde
numerical_constraints.condition: Aan de zijde van de openbare ruimte

provenance.quoted_text: De hoogte van een poort is aan de zijde van de openbare ruimte niet minder dan 1,5 verdieping hoog.

reasons: Clearly stated in Spelregels; unit is 'verdieping' which maps to bouwlagen but no metre equivalent is given.
Beeldkwaliteitsplan is advisory/quality guidance, not binding regels.

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: De hoogte van een poort is aan de zijde van de openbare ruimte niet minder dan 1,5 verdieping hoog. Unit is 'verdieping' (floors/storeys), interpreted as bouwlagen.

numerical_constraints.name: Maximale hoogte maaiveld binnenhof t.o.v. openbare ruimte
numerical_constraints.condition: Hoogte van het maaiveld van binnenhoven ten opzichte van de omliggende openbare ruimte; uitzondering geldt ter plaatse van bomen

provenance.quoted_text: De maximale hoogte van het maaiveld bedraagt 1,5 meter ten opzichte van de omliggende openbare ruimte.

reasons: Clearly stated as a spelregel (design rule). Document type is 'other' (beeldkwaliteitplan), not binding regels, so max score capped at 0.9.

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: Ter plaatse van bomen mag het maaiveld tijdelijk hoger zijn dan 1,5 m. Diagram label confirms: 'H: max1.5 m'.

numerical_constraints.name: Minimale breedte programmatische plint bij halfverdiepte parkeeroplossing
numerical_constraints.condition: Halfverdiepte parkeeroplossingen richting het openbaar gebied; gerekend vanuit de voorgevel van een gebouw

provenance.quoted_text: Halfverdiepte parkeeroplossingen worden richting het openbaar gebied afgezoomd met een progammatische plint van minimaal 6 meter, gerekend vanuit de voorgevel van een gebouw.

reasons: Clearly stated as a spelregel and confirmed by diagram annotation 'min. 6 m'. Document is a beeldkwaliteitplan, not binding regels.

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: Diagram label confirms: 'min. 6 m'. This plint is described as 'programmatisch' (programmatic), implying active use along the public edge.

numerical_constraints.name: Max. breedte privéruimte op maaiveldniveau
numerical_constraints.condition: Privéruimtes op maaiveldniveau binnen binnenhoven

provenance.quoted_text: Privéruimtes op maaiveldniveau zijn toegestaan tot maximaal 2m uit de gevellijn, ontworpen in harmonie met de gebouwarchitectuur.

reasons: Clearly stated in Spelregels section with numeric value and unit.
Document type is 'other' (beeldkwaliteitplan), not binding regels; confidence capped accordingly.

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: Maximum 2m uit de gevellijn voor privéruimtes op maaiveld.

numerical_constraints.name: Minimum bebouwing rooilijn
numerical_constraints.condition: Van de lengte van elke rooilijn

provenance.quoted_text: Minimaal 80% van de lengte van elke rooilijn moet worden bebouwd.

reasons: Clearly stated rule in Spelregels section
Source is a beeldkwaliteitplan (not binding regels), so confidence capped at 0.9

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: Ground floor and first floor may be set back to form a portiek without affecting this rule, provided upper floors are built on the rooilijn. Setbacks on upper floors also allowed without affecting the 80% rule if the main building volume is realised on the rooilijn.

numerical_constraints.name: Minimale afstand tussen twee achterzijden van gebouwen
numerical_constraints.condition: Afstand tussen twee achterzijden van gebouwen

provenance.quoted_text: De afstand tussen twee achterzijden van gebouwen bedraagt minimaal 15 meter.

reasons: Clearly stated rule in Spelregels section
Source is a beeldkwaliteitplan (not binding regels), so confidence capped at 0.9

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: Minimum distance between rear facades of buildings to guarantee minimum courtyard quality.

numerical_constraints.name: Maximale frontbreedte gebouw

provenance.quoted_text: De frontbreedte van een gebouw is maximaal 25 meter.

reasons: Clearly stated in Spelregels section
Document type is 'other' (beeldkwaliteitplan), not binding regels, so confidence capped below 1.0

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: Maximum facade width per building. Part of 'pandsgewijze uitstraling' spelregels.

numerical_constraints.name: Minimaal breedte verschil naast elkaar staande panden
numerical_constraints.condition: Naast elkaar staande panden

provenance.quoted_text: Naast elkaar staande panden verschillen in breedte, minimaaal 5 meter.

reasons: Clearly stated in Spelregels section
Beeldkwaliteitplan is advisory not binding regels

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: Adjacent buildings must differ in width by at least 5 m to avoid repetition.

numerical_constraints.name: Maximale breedte smal gebouw per clusterzijde
numerical_constraints.condition: Elke zijde van het cluster heeft minimaal één gebouw met een maximale breedte van 15 meter. Indien de zijde langer is dan 100 meter, zijn minimaal twee gebouwen van maximaal 15 meter breed vereist.

provenance.quoted_text: Elke zijde van het cluster heeft minimaal één gebouw met een maximale breedte van 15 meter. Indien de zijde langer is dan 100 meter, zijn minimaal twee gebouwen van maximaal 15 meter breed vereist.

reasons: Clearly stated in Spelregels section
Conditional rule with threshold at 100 m side length
Beeldkwaliteitplan is advisory not binding regels

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: Each side of a cluster must have at least one building with a max width of 15 m. If the side is longer than 100 m, at least two buildings of max 15 m wide are required.

numerical_constraints.name: Hoogbouwaccent hoogte
numerical_constraints.condition: Voor hoogbouwaccenten

numerical_constraints.name: Minimaal aantal setback-verdiepingen hoogbouwaccent
numerical_constraints.condition: Geldt voor de laatste (bovenste) verdiepingen van een hoogbouwaccent

provenance.quoted_text: Minimaal de laatste twee verdiepingen van een hoogbouwaccent moeten setbacks bevatten.

reasons: Stated explicitly in both body text and Spelregels bullet; document is a beeldkwaliteitplan (guidance), not binding regels, so confidence is capped at 0.85.

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: The rule specifies that at minimum the last two storeys of a tall-building accent must contain setbacks.

numerical_constraints.name: Minimum height for outdoor spaces on public-facing facades
numerical_constraints.condition: Buitenruimtes aan gevels gelegen aan de openbare ruimte

provenance.quoted_text: Buitenruimtes aan gevels, gelegen aan de openbare ruimte zijn toegestaan vanaf 4 meter hoogte ten opzicht van het maaiveld niveau.

reasons: Clearly stated in the spelregels section with an explicit height value in meters.

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: Outdoor spaces on facades facing public space are only permitted from 4 m above ground level (maaiveld).

numerical_constraints.name: Maximum balcony protrusion above 4 m (public facade)
numerical_constraints.condition: Buitenruimtes aan gevels gelegen aan de openbare ruimte, boven 4 m hoogte

provenance.quoted_text: Buitenruimtes steken maximaal 1.5 meter uit het gevelvlak.

reasons: Explicitly stated maximum protrusion value in the spelregels section.

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: Outdoor spaces (balkons etc.) may protrude a maximum of 1.5 m from the facade plane on public-facing elevations above 4 m.

numerical_constraints.name: Maximum balcony protrusion below 4 m (public facade)
numerical_constraints.condition: Onder de 4 meter, buitenruimtes aan openbare gevels

provenance.quoted_text: Onder de 4 meter mogen buitenruimtes maximaal 0,50 meter uitsteken.

reasons: Explicitly stated maximum protrusion value below 4 m in the spelregels section.

cross_validation.notes: No IMRO plan ID on this project

numerical_constraints.notes: Below 4 m height, outdoor spaces may protrude a maximum of 0.50 m from the facade plane on public-facing elevations.

use_split.rationale: Total programme anchored to [max_bvo_ontwikkelpotentie] of 589,389 m² BVO. Non-residential uses fixed by document targets: commercial [totaal_bvo_commercieel] 3,025 m², bedrijven [min_bvo_bedrijven] ≥15,000 m², kantoren [bvo_kantoren] 3,500–6,500 m² (midpoint 5,000), cultureel [bvo_cultuur_maatschappelijk] 1,000 m², social/education (basisschool 4,230 + medisch 2,200 + cultuur excluded + horeca counted in retail) - using subset of [totaal_bvo_maatschappelijk] 22,150 m² but excluding outdoor spaces (schoolplein 2,300 + buitenruimte VO 2,100) and VO school (8,320 m²) booked separately under social. Residential is the residual to reach 589,389 m² BVO, consistent with [max_woningen_nieuw_legmeer] 4,400 woningen.

reasons: Document specifies hard caps and per-use BVO targets
Residential derived as residual is consistent with 4,400 woning cap at ~125 m² gross per woning including circulation/common

unit_mix.rationale: Sociale huur 20% per [aandeel_sociaal_woningen]; smaller 1br slice for single-person households (CBS buurt avg household size 1.3).

reasons: Tenure share is explicit in document
Typology split is designer judgment informed by CBS

unit_mix.rationale: Remainder of 20% sociale huur as family-oriented 2br to support mixed demographic; complements [min_dwelling_size_private_outdoor] requiring outdoor space >50 m².

reasons: Tenure fixed; typology split judgment-based

unit_mix.rationale: Middenhuur 40% per [aandeel_middelduur_woningen]; bulk allocated to 2br couples/small households.

reasons: Tenure share explicit
Typology consistent with mainstream middenhuur stock

unit_mix.rationale: Family-suitable 3br segment within middenhuur to support family living in the Amstelveense context.

reasons: Tenure share explicit; typology split is designer judgment

unit_mix.rationale: Vrije sector 40% per [aandeel_vrije_sector_woningen]; half allocated as 2br, half as 3br/larger to capture mixed market segment.

reasons: Tenure share explicit

unit_mix.rationale: Other half of vrije sector envelope as koop (grondgebonden/appartement), addressing family demand and aligning with Amstelveen ownership profile; supports grondgebonden woningen referenced in [max_height_rear_garden_fence].

reasons: Split between koop and vrije huur within the 40% vrije sector slice is designer judgment

reasoning_trace.decision: Adopt total programme of 589,389 m² BVO and 4,400 woningen as the upper-bound proposal, since these are explicit hard caps for the entire plangebied.
Acknowledge 3D BAG unavailable (HTTP 400). Height context derived from 2D BAG context and document constraints only — Amstelveense hoogte = 6 bouwlagen base with 12–14 bouwlagen hoogbouwaccenten.

Allocate non-residential BVO to document-specified minima: 3,025 m² retail/horeca, 15,000 m² productive (bedrijven), 5,000 m² office (midpoint of 3,500–6,500), 1,000 m² cultural, ~10,150 m² social (basisschool 4,230 + medisch 2,200 + VO 8,320 partial — capped at 10,150 to fit envelope alongside cultureel; outdoor schoolpleinen excluded from BVO).

Residential GFA set as residual to 589,389 m² → ~555,214 m². At 4,400 woningen this yields ~126 m² gross per woning (including circulation/installations), consistent with Dutch BVO/GBO ratios of ~0.78 giving ~98 m² GBO average — realistic for the 20/40/40 tenure mix.
reasoning_trace.evidence: Derived from [max_bvo_ontwikkelpotentie] minus non-residential uses; cross-checked against [max_woningen_nieuw_legmeer]

reasoning_trace.decision: Apply tenure split 20% sociale / 40% middenhuur / 40% vrije sector strictly per document. Within vrije sector, split 50/50 between vrije sector huur and koop based on designer judgment given Amstelveen market profile.
reasoning_trace.evidence: [aandeel_sociaal_woningen], [aandeel_middelduur_woningen], [aandeel_vrije_sector_woningen]; designer judgment for huur/koop split within vrije sector

reasoning_trace.decision: Bias typology toward small-to-mid units (1br/2br dominant) reflecting buurt demographics: CBS shows avg household size 1.3 in BU03621104, indicating predominantly single/couple households. Reserve ~35% for 3br/family units to support the goal of a mixed neighbourhood with grondgebonden woningen.
reasoning_trace.evidence: [cbs_demographics: 165 households, 230 population, avg HH size 1.3]; [max_height_rear_garden_fence] implies grondgebonden woningen present

reasoning_trace.decision: Estimate parking demand at ~1.0 space per woning average (4,400 spaces) plus marginal additions for commercial/office, justified by Amstelveen suburban context. Note: OSM shows tram 309 m and bus 249 m away — moderate transit; no aggressive reduction warranted. Parking solved partly via parkeergebouw with [max_parking_layers]=5 and pre-investment of €20M ([parking_garage_preinvestment]) flagged.
reasoning_trace.evidence: [parking_garage_preinvestment], [max_parking_layers]; [osm: tram 309m, bus 249m]; designer judgment on per-woning norm (document does not specify residential parking norm)

reasoning_trace.decision: Confirm green/unbuilt envelope compatibility: 70/30 bebouwd/onbebouwd per cluster ([bebouwd_onbebouwd_ratio]) and the urban intent DOEL 1 of green binnenhoven mean realistic GFA stays at — not below — the 589,389 m² envelope only if hoogbouwaccenten (12–14 bouwlagen) are used; otherwise the realistic value drops toward 500,000 m². Range 500,000–589,389 m² reflects this dependency.

reasons: Total GFA and woning cap are explicit hard constraints
Tenure split is explicit at 20/40/40
Non-residential BVO values are explicitly tabulated in the stedenbouwkundig plan
Typology mix and parking norms rest on designer judgment given absence of explicit residential parking norm and unit-size policy
3D BAG unavailable — height context limited to document constraints
